title: coupon — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Two events are CRITICAL: `CouponClawbackRequested` (P1 signal — financial reversal that Finance module must process) and `CouponUsageCapReached` (P2 signal — the campaign ran out and admins likely want to top up OR launch a follow-up). Financial events (`CouponRedeemed` / `CouponRedemptionReversed` / `CouponClawbackCompleted`) additionally fan out to finance::invoice (Wave 4) for line-item discount application + revenue-recognition adjustment. `CouponRedeemed` fires a marketing event downstream when `issuance_source IN ('referral', 'marketing_campaign')` for ad-network conversion attribution.

events.name: CouponCreated
events.trigger: CouponRepository finished a successful create. Fires exactly once per (tenant_id, code) tuple. Distinct from `CouponIssuedManually` / `CouponIssuedByReferralProgram` — those carry issuance-context; this fires unconditionally.

events.name: CouponUpdated
events.trigger: CouponRepository committed an update to a coupon (name, description, valid_until, usage_cap, per_customer_limit, is_stackable, applicable_plan_ids). NOT fired for `discount_type` / `discount_amount` / `discount_currency` mutations — those refuse post-redemption via observer.

events.name: CouponActivated
events.trigger: Coupon.is_active transitioned false -> true. Common paths: manual reactivation before expiry OR admin-initiated activate after a `deactivate` reversal.

events.name: CouponDeactivated
events.trigger: Coupon.is_active transitioned true -> false. Causes: admin manual, usage_cap_reached auto-deactivate, applicable_plan_archived cascade, referral program archived cascade.

events.name: CouponExpired
events.trigger: Coupon.valid_until has passed AND coupon still shows is_active=true. Detected by ExpireCouponsJob nightly sweep OR by CouponValidator.canRedeem() refusing an expired code and firing this event. Idempotent — fires exactly once per coupon.
consumers: notifications::DispatchCouponExpiredNotification (customer if the coupon was owned; admin)

events.name: CouponUsageCapReached
events.trigger: Coupon.usage_count reached Coupon.usage_cap. Fires from CouponObserver.updated when the increment crosses the threshold. P2 signal — the campaign ran out.

events.name: CouponRedeemed
events.trigger: CouponRedeemer::redeem() successfully committed a CouponRedemption row + incremented Coupon.usage_count inside the enclosing invoice-creation transaction. Fires after commit.
consumers: finance::ApplyDiscountToInvoiceLine (Wave 4 — the invoice module reads this and adjusts revenue-recognition)
referrals::ProgressReferralOnCouponRedeemed (only when issuance_source='referral' — notifies referrals module the associated referral progressed)

payload.discount_snapshot: object (frozen coupon config at redemption time)

events.name: CouponRedemptionRefused
events.trigger: CouponRedeemer::redeem() or CouponValidator::canRedeem() rejected the redemption attempt. Fires with the specific refusal reason. Audit-critical — supports customer support triage.

payload.coupon_id: ULID | null (null when code doesn't exist)

events.name: CouponIssuedByReferralProgram
events.trigger: CouponIssuer::issueForReferral() successfully created a Coupon row with issuance_source='referral'. Called by growth::referrals when a ReferralReward.status transitioned to vested with a discount-type reward.
consumers: referrals::LinkCouponToReward (records the coupon_id back onto the referral_rewards row for cross-lookup)

events.name: CouponIssuedManually
events.trigger: CouponIssuer::issueManually() or CouponIssuer::bulkIssue() successfully created one or more Coupon rows with issuance_source IN ('manual', 'marketing_campaign', 'import', 'api'). Fires per created row.

events.name: CouponClawbackRequested
events.trigger: finance::RefundIssued or finance::ChargebackFiled fires for an invoice that carried a CouponRedemption. ProcessCouponClawbackJob is dispatched. P1 signal — every clawback is a financial reversal.

payload.triggering_event_id: ULID (finance event that initiated the clawback)

events.name: CouponClawbackCompleted
events.trigger: ProcessCouponClawbackJob finished — CouponRedemption.reversed_at set + Coupon.usage_count decremented atomically.
consumers: marketing::ReverseCouponRedemptionMarketingEvent (only when the redemption's issuance_source triggered a marketing event)

events.name: CouponRedemptionReversed
events.trigger: Admin manually reversed a redemption via POST /coupons/redemptions/{redemption}/reverse (correction path — not a refund-cascade). Distinct from CouponClawbackCompleted which flows from a Finance refund.
consumers: finance::AdjustInvoiceLineDiscount (Wave 4 — the invoice module reads this and adjusts revenue-recognition)

events.name: CouponReportGenerated
events.trigger: GenerateCouponUsageReportJob finished — the weekly per-tenant report is stored + available for download.
